title: Projekt- und Prozessmanager Lead Management (m/w/d)
company: SCHUNK - Hand in hand for tomorrow
required_skills: B2B industrial process understanding and documentation
bonus_skills: Degree in Marketing, Industrial Engineering, or data-related field with marketing focus
matched_skills: Reporting & analytics / KPI dashboards: HSBC USD 8M programme budget dashboards, sprint review reports at Hapag-Lloyd; Power BI PL-300 certified
Analytical skills: data storytelling and structured insight reports across multiple roles
Stakeholder coordination: central coordination point across teams at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC
German: B1 (partial match only — JD requires very good German)
missing_skills: Marketing Automation (no evidence of tools like Marketo, HubSpot, Pardot, or EVALANCHE)
SAP Sales Cloud (no SAP experience at all)
B2B industrial process lead management (no domain background in manufacturing/industrial B2B)
Conversion rate optimisation for sales funnels
C1 German (candidate is B1 — significant gap for this role)
core_responsibilities: Build, implement, and continuously optimise lead management and marketing automation processes and system landscape
Coordinate end-to-end lead management processes and relevant stakeholders
Define lead status and qualification together with Marketing and Sales
Act as Tool Owner integrating global lead scoring model into SAP Sales Cloud and EVALANCHE
Develop reporting, dashboards, and KPIs; consolidate data across all touchpoints; derive data-based measures
recommended_emphasis: Highlight KPI dashboard and reporting experience (Power BI PL-300, HSBC burn-rate dashboards) as closest match to the reporting/analytics component
Frame Hapag-Lloyd technology operations coordination as process optimisation and stakeholder alignment experience
Acknowledge German at B1 but note active improvement; this is a significant gap to address honestly in cover letter
Do NOT claim SAP or marketing automation tool experience — these are hard requirements the candidate lacks
summary: Match score 28.6% — weak match. The role requires deep marketing automation expertise (SAP Sales Cloud, EVALANCHE), industrial B2B process ownership, and strong German (C1), none of which the candidate possesses. While analytical and stakeholder coordination skills partially transfer, the core technical stack (SAP) and domain specialisation (industrial lead management) represent hard gaps. This role is not recommended unless the candidate has undisclosed automation tool experience.
